testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_386] Reduce potential for WhoAMI cloud image name confusion attack
[NONE][CKV_AWS_46] Ensure no hard-coded secrets exist in EC2 user data
[NONE][CKV_AWS_126] Ensure that detailed monitoring is enabled for EC2 instances
[NONE][CKV_AWS_8] Ensure all data stored in the Launch configuration or instance Elastic Blocks Store is securely encrypted
[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_62] Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
[NONE][CKV_AWS_287] Ensure IAM policies does not allow credentials exposure
[NONE][CKV_AWS_289] Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management / resource exposure without constraints
[NONE][CKV_AWS_286] Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation
[NONE][CKV_AWS_63] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_23] Ensure every security group and rule has a description
[NONE][CKV_AWS_24] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 22
[NONE][CKV_AWS_25] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 3389
[NONE][CKV_AWS_260] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80
[NONE][CKV_AWS_277] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1
[NONE][CKV_AWS_41] Ensure no hard coded AWS access key and secret key exists in provider
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_41] Ensure an IAM role is attached to EC2 instance
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_56] Ensure AWS Managed IAMFullAccess IAM policy is not used.
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_40] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow full IAM privileges
[NONE][CKV_AWS_135] Ensure that EC2 is EBS optimized

failure.message: Ensure that EC2 is EBS optimized

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.ec2.aws_instance.capstone_server File: /modules/ec2/main.tf: 1-34 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-ec2-is-ebs-optimized 1 | resource "aws_instance" "capstone_server" { 2 | ami = var.ami_id 3 | instance_type = var.instance_type 4 | key_name = var.key_name 5 | subnet_id = var.subnet_id 6 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.security_group_id] 7 | iam_instance_profile = var.instance_profile_name 8 | associate_public_ip_address = true 9 | monitoring = true 10 | 11 | root_block_device { 12 | volume_size = 20 13 | volume_type = "gp3" 14 | encrypted = true 15 | delete_on_termination = true 16 | } 17 | 18 | user_data = <<-EOF 19 | #!/bin/bash 20 | apt update -y 21 | apt install -y nginx curl wget 22 | systemctl enable nginx 23 | systemctl start nginx 24 | echo "

Secure AWS DevOps Capstone

Provisioned by Terraform and prepared for Jenkins CI/CD, DevSecOps, and monitoring.

" > /var/www/html/index.html 25 | EOF 26 | 27 | tags = { 28 | Name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-app-server" 29 | Environment = var.environment 30 | ManagedBy = "Terraform" 31 | Project = var.project_name 32 | Security = "Hardened" 33 | } 34 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_88] EC2 instance should not have public IP.

failure.message: EC2 instance should not have public IP.

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.ec2.aws_instance.capstone_server File: /modules/ec2/main.tf: 1-34 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/public-policies/public-12 1 | resource "aws_instance" "capstone_server" { 2 | ami = var.ami_id 3 | instance_type = var.instance_type 4 | key_name = var.key_name 5 | subnet_id = var.subnet_id 6 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.security_group_id] 7 | iam_instance_profile = var.instance_profile_name 8 | associate_public_ip_address = true 9 | monitoring = true 10 | 11 | root_block_device { 12 | volume_size = 20 13 | volume_type = "gp3" 14 | encrypted = true 15 | delete_on_termination = true 16 | } 17 | 18 | user_data = <<-EOF 19 | #!/bin/bash 20 | apt update -y 21 | apt install -y nginx curl wget 22 | systemctl enable nginx 23 | systemctl start nginx 24 | echo "

Secure AWS DevOps Capstone

Provisioned by Terraform and prepared for Jenkins CI/CD, DevSecOps, and monitoring.

" > /var/www/html/index.html 25 | EOF 26 | 27 | tags = { 28 | Name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-app-server" 29 | Environment = var.environment 30 | ManagedBy = "Terraform" 31 | Project = var.project_name 32 | Security = "Hardened" 33 | } 34 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_79] Ensure Instance Metadata Service Version 1 is not enabled

failure.message: Ensure Instance Metadata Service Version 1 is not enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.ec2.aws_instance.capstone_server File: /modules/ec2/main.tf: 1-34 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-general-31 1 | resource "aws_instance" "capstone_server" { 2 | ami = var.ami_id 3 | instance_type = var.instance_type 4 | key_name = var.key_name 5 | subnet_id = var.subnet_id 6 | vpc_security_group_ids = [var.security_group_id] 7 | iam_instance_profile = var.instance_profile_name 8 | associate_public_ip_address = true 9 | monitoring = true 10 | 11 | root_block_device { 12 | volume_size = 20 13 | volume_type = "gp3" 14 | encrypted = true 15 | delete_on_termination = true 16 | } 17 | 18 | user_data = <<-EOF 19 | #!/bin/bash 20 | apt update -y 21 | apt install -y nginx curl wget 22 | systemctl enable nginx 23 | systemctl start nginx 24 | echo "

Secure AWS DevOps Capstone

Provisioned by Terraform and prepared for Jenkins CI/CD, DevSecOps, and monitoring.

" > /var/www/html/index.html 25 | EOF 26 | 27 | tags = { 28 | Name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-app-server" 29 | Environment = var.environment 30 | ManagedBy = "Terraform" 31 | Project = var.project_name 32 | Security = "Hardened" 33 | } 34 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_288] Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration

failure.message: Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.iam.aws_iam_role_policy.ec2_policy File: /modules/iam/main.tf: 24-45 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-288
24 | resource "aws_iam_role_policy" "ec2_policy" { 25 | name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-ec2-policy" 26 | role = aws_iam_role.ec2_role.id 27 | 28 | policy = jsonencode({ 29 | Version = "2012-10-17" 30 | Statement = [ 31 | { 32 | Effect = "Allow" 33 | Action = [ 34 | "cloudwatch:PutMetricData", 35 | "ec2:DescribeTags", 36 | "logs:CreateLogGroup", 37 | "logs:CreateLogStream", 38 | "logs:PutLogEvents", 39 | "secretsmanager:GetSecretValue" 40 | ] 41 | Resource = "*" 42 | } 43 | ] 44 | }) 45 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_355] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

failure.message: Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.iam.aws_iam_role_policy.ec2_policy File: /modules/iam/main.tf: 24-45 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-355
24 | resource "aws_iam_role_policy" "ec2_policy" { 25 | name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-ec2-policy" 26 | role = aws_iam_role.ec2_role.id 27 | 28 | policy = jsonencode({ 29 | Version = "2012-10-17" 30 | Statement = [ 31 | { 32 | Effect = "Allow" 33 | Action = [ 34 | "cloudwatch:PutMetricData", 35 | "ec2:DescribeTags", 36 | "logs:CreateLogGroup", 37 | "logs:CreateLogStream", 38 | "logs:PutLogEvents", 39 | "secretsmanager:GetSecretValue" 40 | ] 41 | Resource = "*" 42 | } 43 | ] 44 | }) 45 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_290] Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints

failure.message: Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.iam.aws_iam_role_policy.ec2_policy File: /modules/iam/main.tf: 24-45 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-290
24 | resource "aws_iam_role_policy" "ec2_policy" { 25 | name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-ec2-policy" 26 | role = aws_iam_role.ec2_role.id 27 | 28 | policy = jsonencode({ 29 | Version = "2012-10-17" 30 | Statement = [ 31 | { 32 | Effect = "Allow" 33 | Action = [ 34 | "cloudwatch:PutMetricData", 35 | "ec2:DescribeTags", 36 | "logs:CreateLogGroup", 37 | "logs:CreateLogStream", 38 | "logs:PutLogEvents", 39 | "secretsmanager:GetSecretValue" 40 | ] 41 | Resource = "*" 42 | } 43 | ] 44 | }) 45 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_382] Ensure no security groups allow egress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1

failure.message: Ensure no security groups allow egress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.security_group.aws_security_group.capstone_sg File: /modules/security-group/main.tf: 1-44 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/bc-aws-382
1 | resource "aws_security_group" "capstone_sg" { 2 | name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-sg" 3 | description = "Restricted security group for Secure AWS DevOps Capstone" 4 | vpc_id = var.vpc_id 5 | 6 | ingress { 7 | description = "Restricted SSH access from engineer IP" 8 | from_port = 22 9 | to_port = 22 10 | protocol = "tcp" 11 | cidr_blocks = [var.my_ip] 12 | } 13 | 14 | ingress { 15 | description = "HTTP access for application testing" 16 | from_port = 80 17 | to_port = 80 18 | protocol = "tcp" 19 | cidr_blocks = [var.my_ip] 20 | } 21 | 22 | ingress { 23 | description = "Node Exporter metrics access" 24 | from_port = 9100 25 | to_port = 9100 26 | protocol = "tcp" 27 | cidr_blocks = [var.my_ip] 28 | } 29 | 30 | egress { 31 | description = "Allow outbound internet access" 32 | from_port = 0 33 | to_port = 0 34 | protocol = "-1" 35 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 36 | } 37 | 38 | tags = { 39 | Name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-sg" 40 | Environment = var.environment 41 | ManagedBy = "Terraform" 42 | Project = var.project_name 43 | } 44 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

failure.message: Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.security_group.aws_security_group.capstone_sg File: /modules/security-group/main.tf: 1-44 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-that-security-groups-are-attached-to-ec2-instances-or-elastic-network-interfaces-enis
1 | resource "aws_security_group" "capstone_sg" { 2 | name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-sg" 3 | description = "Restricted security group for Secure AWS DevOps Capstone" 4 | vpc_id = var.vpc_id 5 | 6 | ingress { 7 | description = "Restricted SSH access from engineer IP" 8 | from_port = 22 9 | to_port = 22 10 | protocol = "tcp" 11 | cidr_blocks = [var.my_ip] 12 | } 13 | 14 | ingress { 15 | description = "HTTP access for application testing" 16 | from_port = 80 17 | to_port = 80 18 | protocol = "tcp" 19 | cidr_blocks = [var.my_ip] 20 | } 21 | 22 | ingress { 23 | description = "Node Exporter metrics access" 24 | from_port = 9100 25 | to_port = 9100 26 | protocol = "tcp" 27 | cidr_blocks = [var.my_ip] 28 | } 29 | 30 | egress { 31 | description = "Allow outbound internet access" 32 | from_port = 0 33 | to_port = 0 34 | protocol = "-1" 35 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 36 | } 37 | 38 | tags = { 39 | Name = "${var.project_name}-${var.environment}-sg" 40 | Environment = var.environment 41 | ManagedBy = "Terraform" 42 | Project = var.project_name 43 | } 44 | }
